description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly black with a bold 'ARCADE' logo in red and white on both side panels, set against a radiating blue and black striped background. The front features a large display screen with static, a steering wheel, and a dashboard-style control panel, suggesting a racing or driving game. The control panel includes a steering wheel, several buttons, and a gear shifter, with racing-themed decals such as checkered flags and a winding road sign. The lower front section houses a coin slot and additional controls, as well as a foot pedal area. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and has a glossy marquee at the top. The back is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design typical of arcade machines.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with racing-themed controls, a static-filled screen, and bold 'ARCADE' graphics on the sides. The front features a steering wheel, buttons, and a coin slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with static, steering wheel, dashboard controls, coin slot, and racing-themed decals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'ARCADE' logo and radiating blue-black stripes, with the cabinet's angled profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned black back panel with no visible features or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the 'ARCADE' logo and striped background, and a glimpse of the control panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, slightly curved, medium size with a thick bezel and visible static on the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player racing layout with a central steering wheel, gear shifter to the right, several buttons, and a pedal area below; racing-themed decals present.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'ARCADE' in bold red and white letters with a blue and black radiating background, matching the side panel theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a large 'ARCADE' logo in red and white over a blue and black radiating striped background, with a glossy finish.
